title: Claude Opus 4.7 GA
summary: Anthropic released Opus 4.7 with a reported 79.4% on SWE-bench Verified (1pp above prior Opus 4.6 score), strong gains on MRCR (a long-context multi-needle retrieval benchmark — tests whether the model can recover multiple facts buried in ~200k tokens of input), and 63% on GPQA Diamond (graduate-lev
